_comment_top: QVAC Cockpit default serve config. Hero model: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B MoE (35B knowledge, ~3B active/token = fast, Q4_K_M ~22GB). Alias 'qwen3.6-moe'. Start: qvac serve openai -c <thispath> --model qwen3.6-moe (default port 11434). Swap the model block for a smaller quant if 22GB doesn't fit your machine.
_comment_tools: tools:true + toolsMode:'static' is REQUIRED for an external OpenAI client like Hermes. 'dynamic' = the SDK's in-process loop -> tool calls leak as raw text / never execute (looks like model weakness). 'auto' is INVALID (model fails preload, 503). Verified on OpenCode 2026-06-19.
_comment_reasoning: reasoning_budget:0 disables Qwen3 thinking. Kept 0 because thinking hurt tool-calling under toolsMode:static in the OpenCode tests. Turn back on only if a demo beat is specifically about reasoning.
_comment_ctx: ctx_size 32768. Hermes auto-detects context_length from /v1/models. Hermes' system prompt grows with enabled skills, so narrow skills for the demo (hermes skills) to keep prompt processing snappy. Bump ctx if Hermes warns about context.
